Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}The biggest bitch in school is leaving, and you're gonna miss her?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}You're transferring... and you didn't say anything...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}It's not like it would've made a difference. Why make us both depressed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}But yeah, my dad suddenly collapsed...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}And they say it'll take a while for him to recover, because of some complications...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}We don't really have that much money, so we can't afford to stay in this area.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Y'know, now that I think about it, you're the only one who bothered being friends with a weirdo like me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}But like I said before... we're both in the same boat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}My parents act like I don't even exist. I hate living with them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}That's why I was so jealous when you moved into the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}You know, you've really changed, Fuuka. You're a lot more cheerful now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}But why'd you move when your house is, like, right here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}If you don't wanna say, that's okay. I'm sure you've got your reasons.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}But, if it's something that you and your parents can work out, then do it while you have a chance.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}It'll be a while before my dad's in any condition for us to have a heart-to-heart.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 11 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Haha, what am I doing? This isn't what I wanted to talk about.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Y'know, Fuuka... I used to think every day was just the same depressing routine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}And, I'm only saying this 'cause it's you, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}You don't really get many second chances in life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I guess this is the last time I'll see this view...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I won't be in school next week 'cause I'll be packing, so... I guess this is goodbye.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Haha, don't you dare come see me off! I wanna say goodbye on my own terms.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}But... you're leaving so suddenly...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Hey, I'm not all broken up about this, just so you know. I've changed a lot since I met you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}I'm gonna try and figure out what I really wanna do with my life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}I know you can do it, Natsuki-chan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 11 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Haha, well now I really feel like I gotta do it. No pressure, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}I got one last thing I wanna say before I go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}If you just accept the way things are, then you'll never move forward... just like me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}So, I hope you can figure out what you want, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}I used to try and please everyone just to fit in.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}I was afraid of not being liked, so I always went along with the people around me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}But, I never really thought about what I wanted.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 11 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}Hahaha, that's so you. Well, if they don't like you for who you are, I say screw 'em.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But... I like you, Fuuka, even if you hate yourself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}"Even if we're apart, we're still connected. So, we can always talk, right?"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}{f 5 21 0 2}"Thanks for being my friend. I'm kinda tearing up now."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}"Even if we're apart, we're still connected. So, we can always talk, right?"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}"Thanks for being my friend. I'm kinda tearing up now."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}"Even if we're apart, we're still connected."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}I'd always assumed my powers were a reflection of my faults...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}I was always worried about how other people see me, and that's why my powers let me "see" others...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}But, I guess there is something I want after all...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}Seeing everyone getting along and working together makes me so happy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}So, I want us to treasure this forever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 70 0 0}I have the power to connect people, even when they're apart...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 71 0 0}My Persona has given me this amazing gift—the friendship I've always wanted.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The resolution in Fuuka's heart has awakened a new Persona...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_041_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Lucia{f 0 1 27}, has given rise to {f 0 1 35}Juno{f 0 1 27}![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 73 0 0}Oh... What are you all doing here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 74 0 0}It is unusual to find you up on the rooftop.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 75 0 0}Well, we didn't see you around, so we weren't sure if you were alright...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 78 0 0}I've made up my mind. I'm going to do everything I can with the power I've been given.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 79 0 0}This is what I've decided I want to do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 81 0 0}Hehe, sorry. I guess that was out of nowhere, wasn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
